summary: MusicScope - A music streaming app with mood-based song prediction, listening history visualization, and comprehensive music browsing features
architectural_notes: Use dataset containing song mood, genre, and artist information
Implement mood-based prediction algorithm for automatic song queueing
Five-page navigation structure: Home, Artists/Albums, Search, Dashboard, Profile
Persistent music player component maintaining state across page navigation
Visualization dashboard with multiple chart types (bars, lines) for listening analytics
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Abstract music-themed hero background with vibrant gradients and sound wave patterns (hero-music-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
- Default album art placeholder with musical notes and colorful geometric shapes (album-placeholder.dim_400x400.png)
- Music note icon for empty states and loading (music-note-icon.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Create Home page at route '/' that displays all songs in a scrollable list with song title, artist, album, and duration, and triggers playback when a song is clicked
Create Artists/Albums page at route '/artists' that groups songs by artist and album with expandable sections, displaying album art or placeholder, and triggers playback when a song is clicked
Create Search page at route '/search' with a search input that filters songs in real-time as user types, displaying matching results, and triggers playback when a result is clicked
Create Dashboard page at route '/dashboard' that displays listening history visualization with colorful bar and line charts, filterable by day, week, month, and year time periods
Create Profile page at route '/profile' that displays user ID, contact information, count of liked songs, count of downloaded songs, and lists of liked/downloaded songs with playback functionality

Implement a persistent music player component that remains visible and functional across all pages, displays current song info (title, artist, album art), includes play/pause, previous/next controls, progress bar, and volume control
Design an interactive, vibrant UI with a distinct visual theme featuring smooth animations, hover effects on clickable elements, gradient accents, and colorful components throughout all pages

new_feature_requests.summary: Backend data models for songs, user profiles, and listening history
Backend methods for song management, user profiles, listening history, and mood-based recommendations
Home page with song list and playback functionality
Artists/Albums page with grouped display and playback
Search page with real-time filtering and playback
Dashboard page with colorful charts showing listening history (day/week/month/year)
Profile page displaying user ID, contact, liked songs, downloaded songs with counts
Persistent music player component with cross-page playback and mood-based auto-queue
Interactive UI with smooth animations, hover effects, and gradient accents
Create backend data model for Song with fields: id (Text), title (Text), artist (Text), album (Text), mood (Text), genre (Text), audioUrl (Text), duration (Nat), and createdAt (Int)
Create backend data model for UserProfile with fields: userId (Principal), displayName (Text), contact (Text), likedSongs (Array of song IDs), downloadedSongs (Array of song IDs), and createdAt (Int)
Create backend data model for ListeningHistory with fields: id (Text), userId (Principal), songId (Text), timestamp (Int), and mood (Text)
Implement backend method to add songs with all fields (title, artist, album, mood, genre, audioUrl, duration) and return the created song
Implement backend method to retrieve all songs as an array
Implement backend method to get songs filtered by artist, returning an array grouped by artist name
Implement backend method to get songs filtered by album, returning an array grouped by album name
Implement backend method to search songs by query string, matching against title, artist, album, or genre, returning filtered results
Implement backend method to create or update user profile with displayName, contact, and return the profile
Implement backend method to get user profile by Principal, returning profile with liked/downloaded song counts
Implement backend method to add a song to user's liked songs array and persist the change
Implement backend method to remove a song from user's liked songs array
Implement backend method to add a song to user's downloaded songs array and persist the change
Implement backend method to record listening history entry with userId, songId, timestamp, and mood
Implement backend method to get listening history for a user, filterable by time period (day, week, month, year), returning an array of history entries with song details
Implement backend mood-based recommendation algorithm that takes current song mood and returns an array of 5-10 songs with matching or complementary moods, excluding recently played songs
Implement auto-queue functionality in music player that fetches mood-based recommendations when current song ends and automatically plays the next recommended song
